title: Blood Dynamo
description: This mod add blood magic  related items, mainly a blood dynamo converting liquide LP to RF
body:
This mod add blood magic  related items (created originally for my modpack but you can use it without permission anywhere ;) )

 

- Blood Dynamo : a thermal-like dynamo wich work by pumping life essence into it and produce Forge Energy.

-Mixed Blood Dynamo, Configurable dynamo allowing you to produce RF with blood and another Fluid (configurable in the config file)

 

**(Every feature listed below need to be enabled in the configs from Version 1.6)**

 

-blood lemon tree : a small, 2 blocks tall bush wich grow on netherrack and give blood lemons on right click. The fruits give regeneration I when eated.

 

-Item Packing System a needed mechanic for me : add the NBT Tag "blood_packed:{count:9}" to any ItemStack to create a packed item.

This item while automaticcly unpack in a player inventory  or by crafting it , you can change the number of given items with the "count" tag.

exemple : /give @p stone 1 0 {blood_packed:{count:9}} 

 

Disabled tools : a mod config allowing you to disable any durability-based tools : add the id on the config and the durability of the item will be caped to 2 (will break after 2 uses)
